subject: [PATCH 09/11] mm/vmstat, memcontrol: Track ZSWAP_B, ZSWAPPED_B per-memcg-lruvec

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the introduction of a small inaccuracy in node stats and suggested exploring alternative solutions to address this issue.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series refactors the tracking of ZSWAP_B and ZSWAPPED_B statistics to account for compressed objects split across nodes, improving accuracy at the cost of introducing a small inaccuracy in node stats due to their PAGE_SIZE granularity. The changes decouple updates of node stats and memcg-lruvec stats, allowing for more precise accounting.
